mapper.select: select scene_id, last_planned_fire_at, last_triggered_at, last_task_id, lease_owner, lease_until, version, updated_at from scene_schedule_state where scene_id = #{sceneId}
mapper.update: update scene_schedule_state set last_planned_fire_at = #{lastPlannedFireAt}, last_triggered_at = #{lastTriggeredAt}, last_task_id = #{lastTaskId}, lease_owner = #{leaseOwner}, lease_until = #{leaseUntil}, version = #{version} where scene_id = #{sceneId}
